name: Local Joe
tagline: Downtown Honolulu's best espresso with latte art on every single cup — no extra charge.
parking: Metered street parking or the Chinatown municipal lot on Smith St
talkStory: This is the downtown office workers' secret weapon — the morning rush is real professionals getting their fix before work. The owner is passionate about making specialty coffee accessible. Pair with a Chinatown walking tour — you're right on the edge of Chinatown's best food stalls, lei shops, and the historic district. Weekend hours are shorter so don't sleep in. If you're a coffee geek, ask about their current bean rotation.
